name: Lilith
description:
Lilith from The NOexistenceN of you AND me.

The girl from the other world.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I wanted to pay tribute to a wonderful and complex character in the best way I can.

Made this mainly because I myself was too obsessed to let go after the events of the game.

It's built with my perspective and interpretation of what, or who, Lilith is.

Since perspective is the whole theme of the game and Lilith as a character, experience may differ, but I tried to make her as accurate as I know how to.
creator: Vor Ansirt
